name: Mandalay Region (Myanmar)
description: A red field charged at the centre with the seal of Mandalay Region.
history: Used by the Mandalay Region government as one of Myanmar's 14 first-level administrative subdivisions (seven regions and seven states, plus Naypyidaw Union Territory). Many regional and state flag designs follow a common pattern based on the national flag, charged with the regional seal.

features.symbolism: the regional emblem of Mandalay Region, charged in the centre of the tricolour
